# Assessment Facts Overview

This directory contains supplemental architecture and analysis artifacts generated during assessment.

- [architecture-diagram.md](./architecture-diagram.md): High-level application architecture and detailed component relationship diagrams.
- [dependency-map.md](./dependency-map.md): External dependency inventory grouped by functional category.
- [api-service-contracts.md](./api-service-contracts.md): Service catalog, API contracts, and communication sequence.
- [data-architecture.md](./data-architecture.md): Database configuration, entity model ER diagram, and persistence boundaries.
- [configuration-inventory.md](./configuration-inventory.md): Configuration sources, profiles, properties, secrets, and runtime version inventory.
- [business-workflows.md](./business-workflows.md): Primary business workflows, domain mapping, and business rule sequencing.
